channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scientists say most of what's in your food remains unknown
item.description: Researchers are exploring a hidden world of thousands of food chemicals beyond those listed on nutrition labels.

item.title: New study examines potential cross-species spread of chronic wasting disease
item.description: A study found that chronic wasting disease can spread silently, with infectious prions present in asymptomatic animals.

item.title: Podcast: Using AI to fight antibiotic resistance
item.description: NSF-supported professor Kevin Minbiole explains how artificial intelligence helps discover new compounds to combat antibiotic resistance.

item.title: Scientists discover a hidden weakness in forever chemicals
item.description: Researchers found that UV light-generated hydrogen radicals can break down persistent PFAS chemicals without additional substances.
